rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for all AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Component ports referenced in contracts must be declared in the component type scope
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use valid AADL component names and port references from the model structure
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Priority as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
